name: @echofiles/echo-pdf
description: Local-first PDF document component core with CLI, workspace artifacts, and reusable page primitives.

scripts.test:unit: npm run check:runtime && vitest run tests/unit
scripts.test:acceptance: npm run check:runtime && npm run build && vitest run tests/acceptance
scripts.test:import-smoke: npm run check:runtime && npm run build && vitest run tests/integration/npm-pack-import.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ts-nodenext-consumer.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run check:runtime && npm run build && vitest run tests/integration/local-document-cli.integration.test.ts tests/integration/local-document.integration.test.ts tests/integration/local-semantic-structure.integration.test.ts tests/integration/npm-pack-import.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ts-nodenext-consumer.integration.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:acceptance && npm run test:integration
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
